creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 165994
Patch v1

kde@ needs an exp-run for a small CMake update. There have been very few changes since 3.4.1, but there's always some stupid port that decides to break when we don't expect it.

Patch attached and also available here: https://people.freebsd.org/~rakuco/exp-runs/cmake-3.4.2-v1.patch
